{{CargoRelic
|name=Disguise Mask
|class_id=20489
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This funny-looking mask used to be a magical item that could give its holder extraordinary strength. The wearer of this mask was capable of transforming into any item and possessed near-immortal recovery power. Unfortunately, after a fierce battle between its previous owner and the snail, the mask was severely damaged and completely lost its powers.
|fame=29
|art=14
|fth=18
|civ=15
|tech=14
|ss1=Per 200 Avatar Score, Snail DEF +1<br>Avatar Score: 10000/10000
|ss2=Per 200 Avatar Score, Snail DEF +2<br>Avatar Score: 10000/10000
|ss3=Per 200 Avatar Score, Snail DEF +3<br>Avatar Score: 10000/10000
|ss4=Per 200 Avatar Score, Snail DEF +3<br>Avatar Score: 10000/10000
|ss7=Per 200 Avatar Score, Snail DEF +3<br>Avatar Score: 10000/10000<br> (Awakened)
}}
